title: Phlegmariurus bampsianus
taxonomy: Phlegmariurus bampsianus belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae, which is a group of small, non-vascular plants commonly known as club mosses or lycopods. Within the family Lycopodiaceae, Phlegmariurus bampsianus is classified as a genus of lycopods. The genus Phlegmariurus is a part of the order Lycopodiales, which comprises various species of club mosses. This classification places Phlegmariurus bampsianus among the ancient and primitive vascular plants. The exact classification may be subject to revision as new research and findings become available.
